allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs", "C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\bin", "$env:APPDATA\\npm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\pnpm"\); foreach\($p in $paths\) { if\(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $p" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 Name; cmd /c "where node 2>nul"; cmd /c "where pnpm 2>nul"; cmd /c "where npx 2>nul")
